packageRules.description: Chart.yaml OCI chart-dependency bumps re-vendor charts/*.tgz + Chart.lock in the same PR, so the archive never drifts from the pinned version.
R27: third-party leaf workload charts (e.g. proof-app/podinfo) auto-merge patch+minor+digest once required checks are green; major stays a manual PR.

R27: platform charts auto-merge patch+minor+digest once required checks are green; major stays a manual PR (blast-radius change to shared cluster infra). ArgoCD itself is deliberately excluded -- it is the GitOps control plane that self-applies every other chart in this repo via the same prune+selfHeal mechanism, so it stays fully manual regardless of update type (security-reviewed MEDIUM).

R26: own-artifact (change-tracking-dashboard chart version + pinned image tag) auto-merges at any level -- including major -- once required checks are green, with no release-age cooldown, so the dashboard's own commit-to-deploy path stays seamless.

GitHub Actions workflow updates are CI-only -- they never touch the deployed cluster, and a bump to an action used by pr-ci.yml runs that workflow with the new version on its own PR (self-testing). Auto-merge patch+minor+digest; major stays a manual PR.

Terraform provider patch+minor auto-merge once required checks are green; major stays a manual PR (provider majors can carry breaking schema changes). No terraform-specific CI gate exists and `terraform apply` is manual, so this only advances versions.tf / .terraform.lock.hcl on main -- nothing applies to the cluster automatically on merge.

customManagers.description: Track the pinned change-tracking-dashboard image tag via its renovate: annotation comment, independent of the chart dependency stream above.
